name: friedparrot.github.io
description: FriedParrot personal site built with VitePress

scripts.docs:dev: npm run prepare:content && vitepress dev docs
scripts.docs:build: npm run prepare:content && vitepress build docs
scripts.docs:deploy: npm run docs:build && rsync -a --delete --exclude=".git" docs/.vitepress/dist/ published-site/ && touch published-site/.nojekyll && cd published-site && git add -A && (git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No site changes to publish." || (git commit -m "Deploy site" && git push origin main))
